rationales.hedonism: He says "my eyes hurt and I skipped lunch entirely," showing he pushed through physical discomfort and denied basic enjoyment while working.
rationales.achievement: He spent hours fixing the warehouse mistake and "writing a detailed process document" to keep operations from falling apart, showing strong task focus and performance drive.

rationales.hedonism: He takes "late-night shifts that nobody wants" and says keeping the smile on for the rating program "takes a lot of energy," showing comfort and enjoyment being sacrificed.
rationales.achievement: He tracks earnings, maps "which restaurants have the fastest pickup times," and monitors his 4.92 rating, all of which show active optimization and performance orientation.
rationales.security: His choices are centered on steadier income after hearing his wife "might cut hours," including checking savings, chasing surge pricing, and valuing "more consistent income."
rationales.conformity: He is willing to keep "the smile on" and maintain the app's rating requirements for two months straight, showing restraint and compliance with external expectations to avoid penalties.
rationales.benevolence: He takes extra late-night shifts in direct response to the household financial strain after his wife may lose hours, showing effort to support the family.

rationales.hedonism: Although he makes "an actual meal" and opens wine, he immediately turns it into something he "needed to justify" and says good food feels like he has "spent something," undermining present enjoyment.
rationales.achievement: He keeps converting dinner into "two hours in the library" or time for a chapter "already a week behind," showing a strong pull toward productivity and academic performance.

rationales.stimulation: She is drawn to an adventurous alternative but shuts it down, admitting she was afraid to learn it was "actually doable" and backed away from a more novel life.
rationales.security: She explicitly says the real barrier is not wanting "to give up what I already know," which shows preference for the familiar and stable over a disruptive opportunity.
